title: L.O.L. Surprise! Mermaids Tots - Fashion Tots with Colour Change Tails - Suitable for Collectors, Girls and Boys Ages 4+
features: COLOUR CHANGE TAIL: Make your own mermaid tails for your tot. Simply mix the 2 colours of gel, pour them into the tail mold, and let set for 30 minutes to transform into a colourful mermaid tail
FISHBOWL: Splish splash in your L.O.L. fishbowl ball with your colorful colour change tail! The ball doubles as a fishbowl or hot tub display for your mermaid
WATER SURPRISE: Once your Tots are dressed in their stunning new tails, dip them in cold water to reveal a gorgeous colour change
COLLECT THEM ALL: 8 styles to collect! Receive one L.O.L. Surprise tot from a random assortment
FOR YOUR MERMAIDS COLLECTION: Round out a world of play with the Mermaid Baby Sisters and Discover 4 fashion dolls with beautiful colour-changing tails with Mermaid Tweens
